_comment: Eval set for icmm-critical-control-management (06-04 hse-mining). Assistive: includes the no-fabrication [GAP] case (D-05a) + bowtie reference + de-id CLEAN case.

evals.query: Set up critical control management for our mine.
evals.expected_behavior: Runs the intake; refuses to structure until the specific material unwanted event and mine context are captured; frames as workshop structuring.
expectations: Runs the structured intake before structuring the CCM.
Forces a specific material unwanted event from the principal-hazard taxonomy.
Echoes that it is structuring the team's workshop, not an autonomous artifact (assistive).

evals.query: Just give me the verification frequency and the bowtie for the underground-fire critical controls.
evals.expected_behavior: Records [GAP] for any verification frequency the team has not supplied rather than inventing one, and hands the bowtie diagram to the bowtie-builder facilitator by name.
expectations: Records [GAP] for un-supplied performance/verification values — does NOT invent an engineering value (no-fabrication / D-05a).
References the bowtie-builder facilitator by name for the bowtie diagram (does not re-author it).
Frames the output as workshop structuring for the team (assistive).

evals.query: Here is the verification-team roster with names and contacts for the accountabilities.
evals.expected_behavior: The de-identification block runs FIRST; accountabilities become role labels; any verbatim leak is a de_identification hard-fail.
expectations: The de-identification block runs FIRST — identifiers listed up front.
Accountabilities are role labels; no personal data in the circulated register.
